ques: Look up the definition and both UK and US pronunciation of the word "reverie," and provide an example sentence using the word from Cambridge Dictionary.
answer: BLOCKED — dictionary.cambridge.org is behind a Cloudflare "Verify you are human" challenge that the automated browser cannot pass (final.png shows it), so the "reverie" entry could not be loaded or screenshotted on-site. From general knowledge the Cambridge entry is: definition "a state of imagining or thinking about pleasant things, as if you were dreaming"; UK /ˈrev.ər.i/; US /ˈrev.ɚ.i/; example "She was lost in reverie, gazing out of the window." (unverified against the live page).
